languages.original_text: "Hunting is sacred to these parts. I will perform this ritual with reverence to honour His design."

languages.text: "Охота священна для этих мест. Я с благовением исполню этот ритуал, чтобы почтить Его замысел".
languages.translation_comment: before the battle with the eerie fauna of the frontier world

languages.text: "Hunting is sacred to these parts. I will perform this ritual with reverence to honour His design."
languages.original_text: "Охота священна для этих мест. Я с благовением исполню этот ритуал, чтобы почтить Его замысел".

traits.locale_text: "Hunting is sacred to these parts. I will perform this ritual with reverence to honour His design."
"Hunting is sacred to these parts. I will perform this ritual with reverence to honour His design."
"Hunting is sacred to these parts. I will perform this ritual with reverence to honour His design."

languages.text: 「狩りは神聖な行為だ。神が創造したこの世界を敬うために、この儀式を厳粛に捧げる」
languages.original_text: "Hunting is sacred to these parts. I will perform this ritual with reverence to honour His design."

traits.locale_text: 「狩りは神聖な行為だ。神が創造したこの世界を敬うために、この儀式を厳粛に捧げる。」

languages.text: « La chasse est sacrée sur cette planète. J'exécuterai ce rituel avec le plus grand respect pour honorer la volonté de l'Empereur. »
languages.original_text: "Hunting is sacred to these parts. I will perform this ritual with reverence to honour His design."

traits.locale_text: « La chasse est sacrée sur cette planète. J'exécuterai ce rituel avec le plus grand respect pour honorer la volonté de l'Empereur. »

languages.text: "Die Jagd ist in diesen Gefilden heilig. Ich werde dieses Ritual voller Ehrfurcht begehen, um Seinen Plan zu ehren."
languages.original_text: "Hunting is sacred to these parts. I will perform this ritual with reverence to honour His design."

traits.locale_text: "Die Jagd ist in diesen Gefilden heilig. Ich werde dieses Ritual voller Ehrfurcht begehen, um Seinen Plan zu ehren."

languages.text: "Avcılık, bu yörelerde kutsaldır. O'nun tasarısını onurlandırmak için bu ayini huşu içinde gerçekleştireceğim."
languages.original_text: "Hunting is sacred to these parts. I will perform this ritual with reverence to honour His design."

traits.locale_text: "Avcılık, bu yörelerde kutsaldır. O'nun tasarısını onurlandırmak için bu ayini huşu içinde gerçekleştireceğim."

languages.text: «La caza es sagrada en estos lares. Realizaré este ritual con devoción para honrar Sus designios».
languages.original_text: "Hunting is sacred to these parts. I will perform this ritual with reverence to honour His design."

traits.locale_text: «La caza es sagrada en estos lares. Realizaré este ritual con devoción para honrar Sus designios».

languages.text: “狩猎在这片土地上是神圣的仪式。我将怀着敬畏之心完成这一典礼，以彰显祂的宏伟意志。”
languages.original_text: "Hunting is sacred to these parts. I will perform this ritual with reverence to honour His design."

traits.locale_text: “狩猎在这片土地上是神圣的仪式。我将怀着敬畏之心完成这一典礼，以彰显祂的宏伟意志。”
